releases.summary: Project detail page fixes after the v2.15.0 dashboard redesign
changes: Fixed a regression from v2.15.0: the project detail page's 'Total Hours' stat lost its styling when the dashboard overview bar was replaced. Restored .overview-stat/.overview-number/.overview-label (the hours bar is now their only consumer)

Harmonized the priority badge on the project detail page into the same soft-pill family as the restyled stage badge (matching radius, shared status-color tokens, no border), so the two badges read as one system in both light and dark themes

releases.summary: Dashboard redesign — summary bar, insight widgets, compact project table
changes: Rebuilt the dashboard surface on a single design-token layer (one type scale, conventional stage colors, hairline borders, no drop shadows) after a research pass over Linear, Stripe, Mercury, HubSpot and Datadog dashboard patterns
New navy summary bar: total projects, Live / Building / Open tasks / Quiet-14d+ figures, and an auto-generated 'across <verticals>' line
Three insight widgets replace the stat row: Needs attention (quiet projects first, then most open tasks), Pipeline by stage (CSS bars), and Recent activity (cross-project update feed)

Compact project table: two-line name+category/industry cell, soft-pill stage badges, task chips, quiet-age highlighting; Priority and AI-Updates columns retired from the table (priority still drives filter/sort)
Stage badges restyled site-wide as soft pills with a status dot — also improves the project detail page, which shares the class
Removed the Chart.js dependency and the doughnut chart; the pipeline is now pure CSS. Column-header and dropdown sort/filter behavior preserved
Dark theme carried through the new surface with brightened status colors

releases.summary: Brickture — photo-to-brick mobile app added to the Entertainment vertical
changes: New case study: Brickture — an iOS and Android app that turns any photo into a buildable brick mosaic with a matched color palette, parts list, and build instructions (case-study-entertainment-brickture.html), added to the Case Studies listing and sitemap.xml

Products page: Brickture added to In Development with waitlist capture (source: brickture-waitlist), an anchor at #brickture, and a SoftwareApplication entry in the CollectionPage structured data; grid widened from 2 to 3 columns
Homepage: Entertainment industry card now leads with Brickture; hero rotator's Entertainment slide switched to Brickture (js/hero.js); meta description updated
Services page: Entertainment intro broadened beyond Pinball Fantasy; 'Interactive Experiences' card replaced with 'Vision & Creative Tools' covering the computer vision work behind Brickture

Trademark safety: Brickture described with generic brick language throughout, with a single LEGO(R) reference on products.html and the case study, each paired with a LEGO Group non-affiliation disclaimer
Copy consistency: newsletter blurb on the homepage and products page now names entertainment alongside the other three verticals
Brickture is pre-launch — all copy is framed as in-development with no performance claims or launch date

releases.summary: About page: Steve Caggiano's title updated to Sales & Marketing
changes: Updated Steve Caggiano's role on about.html from 'Marketing' to 'Sales & Marketing'

releases.summary: Products page + Ann Elise launch visibility + mobile UX fixes
changes: New products.html showcasing Ann Elise (flagship, with feature bullets, brand panel, and 'Try Ann Elise Free' CTA), Pinball Fantasy, and In Development (AI Concrete Bidding with waitlist capture, Ann Elise LSAT Prep)
Added 'Products' to the header nav and footer Company column on all 13 public pages; products.html added to sitemap.xml with CollectionPage/SoftwareApplication structured data

Homepage Ann Elise visibility: 'New — Ann Elise is live' announcement pill in the hero (links to annelisetutor.com), Ann Elise featured card added to Featured Work (now 3-up), Education industry card and hero rotator now name Ann Elise
Education case study: added a 'now live as Ann Elise' callout linking to annelisetutor.com
Mobile fix: form and newsletter inputs raised to 16px to stop iOS Safari auto-zoom on focus
Mobile fix: hamburger toggle enlarged to a 44px tap target; hero dots to 32px; Advantage progress bars to 24px (visuals unchanged)
Mobile fix: reserved space for the rotating hero headline/product line so the CTAs no longer bounce every cycle; comparison grid no longer clips on 320-360px screens
Accessibility: nav toggle now manages aria-expanded/aria-controls and the menu closes on Escape

releases.summary: Footer social icons (X, Instagram, LinkedIn)
changes: Added X (@takgioai), Instagram (@takgioai), and LinkedIn (company/takgio) icon links to the footer brand column on every page
Updated the footer tagline to include Entertainment for consistency with the new vertical

releases.summary: Entertainment vertical + animated homepage hero
changes: New animated homepage hero: the headline cycles through Construction → Legal → Education → Entertainment, shifting color, product line, and background glow to match (js/hero.js); pauses on hover, respects reduced-motion, clickable dots
Added Entertainment as a 4th industry vertical sitewide (pink theme): homepage industries grid (now 4-up), Services section, footers, About
New case study: Pinball Fantasy — AI fantasy sports for competitive pinball, powered by the TAZ prediction model (case-study-entertainment-pinball.html), added to the Case Studies listing and sitemap
Broadened homepage/services/case-studies meta + Open Graph copy to include entertainment; softened single-vendor Claude phrasing in new copy

releases.summary: New Insights article: 90-day AI pilot playbook
changes: Added insight-90-day-ai-pilot.html — 'How to Run a 90-Day AI Pilot That Actually Ships'
Featured it as the newest post on the Insights index and added it to sitemap.xml

releases.summary: Live booking link on contact page
changes: Wired the contact-page 'Book an intro call' button to the live Google Calendar appointment schedule ('30 min with Ted', info@takgio.com — weekdays, Eastern, Google Meet auto-added)
Updated copy from 20-minute to 30-minute intro call; removed the placeholder Cal.com link

releases.summary: Google Analytics 4 live
changes: Connected the live GA4 Measurement ID (G-SGJ5VGGZQD) in js/analytics.js — analytics now active across all public pages
GA4 property 'TAKGIO Website' created under info@takgio.com (Eastern time zone, USD), web stream for www.takgio.com with Enhanced Measurement on

releases.summary: Animated 'TAKGIO Advantage' showcase on the homepage
changes: New self-playing motion-graphic section below the hero (vanilla CSS/JS, no video file)
Auto-rotating proof panel cycles four real case-study results with animated count-up (Construction 60%, Legal 85%, Construction 75%, Education 3x); pauses on hover/focus, clickable progress dots
'TAKGIO vs. off-the-shelf AI' comparison with check/cross rows that stagger in on scroll
Animated drifting background glow for a premium feel; respects prefers-reduced-motion and stacks on mobile
Added js/showcase.js and showcase styles to css/styles.css

releases.summary: Marketing & SEO foundation — social share cards, structured data, analytics, Insights blog, lead capture
changes: Open Graph + Twitter Card meta on every public page so shared links render rich preview cards (image, title, description)
Branded 1200x630 social share image (images/og-image.png) used across all share cards
JSON-LD structured data: Organization + WebSite on the homepage, Article schema on all case studies and the new blog post
Canonical URLs on every public page; new sitemap.xml and robots.txt (internal app pages disallowed)
Google Analytics 4 wired in via js/analytics.js — paste your GA4 Measurement ID to switch it on (off until then, no phantom traffic)
New Insights blog: insights.html index plus a starter article on why document-heavy industries are the highest-ROI place to deploy AI; added to nav and footer
Newsletter email capture band in the footer site-wide (posts to Formspree, with spam honeypot)
Contact page: added a 'Book an intro call' booking callout (set your Cal.com/Calendly link) and the missing Education industry option; honeypot added to the contact form

releases.summary: About page updated for three industries
changes: Updated About page text, stats, and team bios to reference all three industries (Construction, Legal, Education)
Industry verticals stat changed from 2 to 3

releases.summary: Visual design refresh — dark gradient hero, card depth, tighter spacing, tech strip
changes: Dark gradient hero on homepage with abstract blue glow effect and white text
Added 'Built with' tech strip below hero showing Claude, Vercel, and Supabase
Cards now have persistent subtle shadows with enhanced hover depth (lift + larger shadow)
Primary buttons use gradient fill with colored shadow for premium feel
Section-alt backgrounds use subtle gradient instead of flat color
Tighter mobile spacing — reduced section padding and grid gaps on small screens
Case study listing cards and featured cards also get enhanced shadow treatment

releases.summary: Education industry vertical and anonymous case study
changes: Added Education as third industry vertical across the entire site (teal theme)
New Education section on Services page with 4 service cards: Adaptive Learning, Assessment, Curriculum Intelligence, Engagement Analytics
New anonymous case study: AI-Powered Personalized Learning Platform (based on real product, written to protect competitive details)
Case Studies page switched from 3-column to 2x2 grid layout for 4 cards
Updated Industries We Serve on homepage from 2-column to 3-column grid
Updated footers, taglines, and CTAs on all public pages to include Education

releases.summary: Default sort by stage and AI Updates column on dashboard
changes: Dashboard now sorts by Stage by default (Idea → Building → UAT → Live → Paused → Discarded)
Added 'AI Updates' column with green checkmark for projects that have GitHub repo configured

releases.summary: Revised project lifecycle stages: Idea → Building → UAT → Live
changes: Renamed 'Active' stage to 'Building' to better reflect projects under development
Added new 'UAT' (User Acceptance Testing) stage between Building and Live
Removed 'Completed' stage (unused)
Updated stage colors: Building (green), UAT (purple), Live (blue)
Staleness detection now flags Building projects with no update in 14+ days
Updated all dropdowns, filters, stats bar, doughnut chart, and documentation

releases.summary: Collapsible task groups and cleaner activity timeline
changes: Tasks section now shows summary counts by status (Open, Completed) with collapsible groups
Click a status group header to expand/collapse task rows
All groups start collapsed by default to keep the page compact
Removed task created/completed entries from the activity timeline — only updates and stage transitions shown

releases.summary: Password recovery flow on login page
changes: Login page now handles password recovery tokens from Supabase email links
Shows a Set New Password form when recovery token is detected
Password confirmation with validation before updating

releases.summary: Simplified hours stats to Total Hours only
changes: Removed Today and This Week hours stats — only Total Hours remains
Today/This Week were unreliable since hours are tied to update post time, not when work was done

releases.summary: AI updates no longer include hours — hours are manual only
changes: Removed hours estimation from AI-generated updates to prevent inflated Today/This Week stats
Hours should only come from manual updates where the user enters them

releases.summary: Team members table for task assignment and filtering
changes: Task assignee dropdown now pulls from team_members table instead of activity-based names
Tasks page filter also uses team_members table
New team members appear immediately without needing prior activity

releases.summary: Default dashboard sort by last updated
changes: Dashboard now sorts by Updated (most recent first) by default instead of Stage

releases.summary: Fix dashboard syntax error in task count rendering
changes: Fixed var declarations that were placed inside the return string concatenation

releases.summary: Open tasks count column on dashboard
changes: Added 'Tasks' column to dashboard showing open task count per project
Red badge displays the count, dash shown when zero
Column is sortable (click header to sort by task count)
Open tasks fetched in parallel with projects and updates

releases.summary: Tasks page shows all team tasks with assignee filter
changes: Tasks page now shows ALL tasks across the team, not just the current user's
Added assignee as the first column in each task row
Added 'All Team Members' dropdown filter to view tasks by person
Added project name column linking back to the project detail page
Page title changed from 'My Tasks' to 'Tasks'

releases.summary: Compact task rows on My Tasks page
changes: My Tasks page now uses the same compact single-line row format as the project detail page
Shows description, project name (linked), date, status, and actions all inline

releases.summary: Compact single-line task rows
changes: Tasks now display as compact rows: description, assignee, date, status, and actions all on one line
Replaced card-based task layout with row-based layout matching project list style

releases.summary: Fix New Task modal — wrong escape function name
changes: Fixed escapeHtml → esc() call in task modal dropdown rendering

releases.summary: New Task modal with team member dropdown
changes: Replaced browser prompt() dialogs with a proper modal form for creating tasks
Assignee field is now a dropdown populated from existing team members in the database
Team members loaded automatically from projects, updates, and tasks tables

releases.summary: Last Update column prefers release notes over raw content
changes: Dashboard Last Update column now shows release_notes when available, falls back to content

releases.summary: Increase Last Update snippet to 250 characters
changes: Last Update column now shows up to 250 characters before truncating

releases.summary: Move Last Update to last column with auto-wrap
changes: Last Update column moved to the right (after Updated)
Text wraps naturally instead of truncating with ellipsis
Rows align to top for multi-line content

releases.summary: Last Update shown as a separate column on the dashboard
changes: Added 'Last Update' column between Project name and Stage
Shows truncated latest update text (100 chars) for each project
Reverted subtitle approach in favor of dedicated column

releases.summary: Show latest update snippet on dashboard project list
changes: Dashboard project rows now show a one-line snippet of the latest update below the project name
Updates fetched in parallel with projects for fast loading
Snippet truncated to 120 characters with ellipsis

releases.summary: Limit AI update to once per day per project
changes: Generate AI Update button disabled if a Claude update already exists for today
Button shows 'AI Updated Today' with checkmark when already used

releases.summary: Compact spacing across project detail page for maximum content density
changes: Reduced padding and margins throughout: detail top card, hours bar, update form, timeline entries, tasks section
Tighter back link, badges, description, and fields grid spacing
Compact timeline cards with less padding between entries
Dashboard overview bar also compacted
Font sizes preserved for readability

releases.summary: Move update buttons into hours stats bar
changes: Moved Perform Manual Update and Generate AI Update buttons into the hours stats bar
Hours on the left, action buttons on the right within the same card

releases.summary: Collapsible update form with separate Manual and AI update buttons
changes: Replaced 'Add Update' form with two action buttons: Perform Manual Update and Generate AI Update
Manual update form hidden by default, toggles open on click with Cancel to close
Generate AI Update button now at top level alongside Manual Update button

releases.summary: Fix AI update button: add apikey header for Supabase gateway
changes: Added apikey header to Edge Function fetch request
Improved error messages to show server-side details

releases.summary: AI-powered project status updates via one-click button
changes: Added 'Generate AI Update' button on project detail page (purple, matches Claude branding)
Supabase Edge Function reads GitHub repo commits and docs, calls Anthropic API to compose update
Auto-estimates hours worked from commit timestamps and volume
Extracts tools, version, and release notes from repo data
Updates appear in timeline with existing purple dot and '(via Claude)' label
Button only appears for projects with a github_repo configured
Added github_repo column to projects table

releases.summary: Retire old ideas page, redirect to dashboard
changes: ideas.html now redirects to dashboard.html
Removed old idea-detail.html, ideas.js, idea-detail.js, and ideas.css

releases.summary: Hours tracking on project updates with stats bar
changes: Added numeric hours field to project updates (replaces free-text time input)
Project detail page shows Total / Today / This Week hours stats bar
Hours aggregation calculated from all updates on the project
Database: added hours NUMERIC column to updates table

releases.summary: Compact spacing across all public site pages
changes: Reduced spacing variables: --space-lg from 2rem to 1.25rem, --space-xl from 3rem to 2rem, --space-2xl from 4rem to 2.5rem, --space-3xl from 6rem to 3.5rem
Tighter hero section, section headers, card icons, and footer padding
Desktop breakpoint sections use --space-2xl instead of --space-3xl
Applies to all public pages: Home, Services, Case Studies, About, Contact

releases.summary: Clickable version badge opens release notes
changes: Click version number next to TAKGIO to view full release history
Release notes modal shows version, date, summary, and change list for each release

releases.summary: Dark theme overhaul and clickable column sorting
changes: Dark theme rebuilt to Material Design standard (WCAG AA contrast ratios)
CSS custom properties override in dark mode so entire page inherits consistently
Proper dark surfaces (#121212 bg, #1E1E1E cards, #252525 inputs)
High-emphasis text at 87% white, medium at 60%, disabled at 38%
Desaturated accent color (#6B8AFF) for dark mode readability
Clickable column headers with ascending/descending sort arrows
Custom dark scrollbar styling

releases.summary: Project Dashboard launch
changes: Replaced Ideas page with full project lifecycle dashboard
Supabase Auth login (individual accounts for Ted, Ritchie, Steve)
Dashboard with sortable project list, clickable column headers, doughnut chart, overview stats
Project detail pages with timeline, updates, tasks, and stage transitions
My Tasks page for personal task queue across projects
Six lifecycle stages: Idea, Active, Paused, Completed, Live, Discarded
Staleness detection for Active projects (14+ days without update)
Vivid/Dark theme toggle
Strategy doc and database schema in docs/
